summary: Iteration 5: Admin A/B Dashboard + OxaPay Monitoring + Visual Fixes. All backend tests PASSED (12/12). Frontend pages verified: /admin/ab and /admin/oxapay show 'Admin access required' for non-authenticated users. Landing page hero mosaic has 5 artist tiles + Deezer Premium card. Offers page has hover animation on pricing cards.
seed_data_creation: Test webhooks created during testing (test_wh_*, test_idempotent_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin A/B and OxaPay monitoring pages implemented. Both pages show 'Admin access required' for non-authenticated users and redirect to /admin/login. AdminDashboard has links to /admin/ab and /admin/oxapay with data-testid='admin-ab-link' and 'admin-oxapay-link'. Landing page mosaic has 5 artist tiles (indices 1-5 in the map). Offers page hover animation applies to wrapper parent with 'hover:-translate-y-[3px]'.

verified_flows.details: Inserts doc with received_at, order_id, status, processed, processing_error. Idempotent for completed orders.
Returns 401 without auth. Returns {webhooks: [...]} with admin auth.
Returns 404 for non-existent order. Returns 401 without auth.
Returns {experiment, variant_a: {view, click, conversion, ctr, cr}, variant_b: {...}}
Accepts view/click/conversion events with experiment, variant, session_id
Shows 'Admin access required' card with 'Sign in as admin' link for non-authenticated users
Shows 'Admin access required' card with 'Sign in as admin' link for non-authenticated users
Hero mosaic displays 5 artist tiles (big Nine Inch Nails + 5 small tiles) + 'Deezer Premium activated' card at bottom. Bottom-right cell is now filled.
4 pricing cards displayed. 'Popular' badge on pack_5, 'Best value' badge on pack_10 (A/B variant A). Hover animation applies to wrapper parent with 3px translate.
Links to /admin/ab and /admin/oxapay present with data-testid='admin-ab-link' and 'admin-oxapay-link'
